title: Blue Seoul Vehicles
description: Blue Seoul Vehicles is a variety of civilian vehicle pack in South Korea
body:
![BLUE SEOUL VEHICLES v6 NARAE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f42ee7ebc46c923de531b47a36c57078437d0af.png)
![Blue Seoul Narae Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68de04d66a2a96ddbe9b2c238e4a96892d7461de_0.webp)
Blue Seoul is back with emergency vehicle update. this time, adding police cars, ambulance, fire truck, and more. Along with the newly added **Sonata The Edge**, the existing **K5** and **Sonata New Rise** have been added as police cars, and the ~~County New Breeze~~ has been remade as the **New County**, which can be used as a town bus as well as a fire personnel transport bus with a **Megatruck** fire truck. **Grand Starex** has also been added for passenger, cargo, and ambulance variants. Thank you for your patience, and we'll be back with additional update after some time.

⚠️ Since some vehicles have been removed, backup may take a long time in some larger maps

[Discord](https://discord.gg/3WSUX5VNku)

This pack requiers:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles)
